subject: Physics
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: General Physics
topics: quantities, precision and accuracy, and equilibrium.
activities: learners will engage in as they explore.
Artificial Materials: Magnets, plastic, glass. ruler, spring balance or force sensor
Natural environment such as school surroundings
assessment: Check if learners are correctly designing and conducting an experiment
What happened to the magnetic force when the distance between the magnets;
What is the conclusion of the activity?
